raise_matrix.name: external_temperature
raise_matrix.meaning: outside temperature; bit7 means negative Celsius

raise_matrix.name: steering_panel_key
raise_matrix.meaning: steering wheel and panel keys; status 0 release, >=1 press/repeat

raise_matrix.name: air_conditioning
raise_matrix.meaning: climate popup; AC/dual/auto/air direction/defog/recirc bits in FLAGS

raise_matrix.name: vehicle_doors
raise_matrix.meaning: bit0 LF, bit1 RF, bit2 LR, bit3 RR, bit4 trunk, bit5 hood

raise_matrix.name: vehicle_sunroof_candidate
raise_matrix.meaning: experimental 0x40 from C-CAN 0x541 DATA[7]&0x02; not decoded by public RZC Korea
raise_matrix.source: local CAN log; TEYES support unknown

raise_matrix.name: ac_climate_status
raise_matrix.meaning: show climate panel/status; public code comment references 2017 KX5

raise_matrix.name: reverse_local
raise_matrix.meaning: reverse off/on used by programmer firmware

raise_matrix.name: setting
raise_matrix.meaning: settings command; not decoded in public manager

raise_matrix.name: host_status_usb
raise_matrix.meaning: USB media numeric status; photo shows seconds incrementing

raise_matrix.name: valid_unknown
raise_matrix.meaning: valid checksum in user WR photo but not present in public RZC Korea protocol

can_matrix.implementation_note: Full frame: C-CAN ch1 500000 STD ID 0x541 DLC 8 DATA ...; DATA[0]=03 is ignition, not sunroof.

can_matrix.dbc_signals: CF_Gway_WiperIntSw; CF_Gway_WiperLowSw; CF_Gway_WiperHighSw; CF_Gway_WiperAutoSw; CF_Gway_WiperMistSw; CF_Gway_WiperIntT

can_matrix.implementation_note: main candidate for Music USB spam
do not confuse with C-CAN 0x4F4 SPAS12

can_matrix.implementation_note: 10s isolated driver seat heater test; candidate only, level mapping 1/2/3/off not confirmed.

can_matrix.observed_signal_or_byte: unique=35; changing bytes DATA[0], DATA[1], DATA[4]; examples 3E 23 00 00 10 7F 80 00 / 41 21 00 00 11 7F 80 00
can_matrix.implementation_note: Secondary/noisy candidate; may include cabin climate/seat state, use with 0x4E5 until isolated level mapping is captured.

can_matrix.dbc_signals: CF_Datc_ModDisp; CF_Datc_IntakeDisp; CF_Datc_AutoDisp; CF_Datc_AcDisp; CF_Datc_DualDisp; CF_Datc_FrontBlwDisp
CF_Gway_PASDisplayFLH; CF_Gway_PASDisplayFRH; CF_Gway_PASDisplayFCTR; CF_Gway_PASDisplayRCTR; CF_Gway_PASDisplayRLH; CF_Gway_PASDisplayRRH; PASRsound; PASFsound
can_matrix.implementation_note: captured in reverse/parking segments but stayed 00 00 00 00; obstacle distances not captured
0x390 changes continuously; mixed steering/SPAS status, needs isolated R+obstacle mapping
0x4F4 toggles with front sensor button and reverse; values include 00 00 C0 ... 00/01, 00 01 C0 ... 30 01, 24/25/26/27 02/03 C0 ...
0x58B stayed 11 00 04 00 00 00 00 20 in parking segments; no left/right RCTA event captured
